reference_sql: WITH subnet_stakes AS (  SELECT netuid, uid, stake,     SUM(stake) OVER (PARTITION BY netuid) AS total_stake   FROM validators) SELECT netuid, uid, stake, total_stake,   stake / NULLIF(total_stake, 0) AS stake_share FROM subnet_stakes WHERE stake / NULLIF(total_stake, 0) > 0.5 ORDER BY stake_share DESC
